page_title: Termination law and at-will exceptions — New Hampshire
meta_title: New Hampshire Termination Law and At-Will Exceptions 2026 | Teamed
meta_description: New Hampshire at-will employment 2026: Cloutier v. A. & P. Tea Co. public-policy exception, RSA 354-A anti-discrimination (6+ employees), RSA 275-E Whistleblowers' Protection Act, final pay within 72 hours of involuntary dismissal (RSA 275:44), NH WARN-equivalent RSA 275-F.

hero_image.alt: Winding road through New Hampshire's autumn foliage landscape.

compliance_sources.fact: Final wages due within 72 hours of involuntary dismissal; next regular payday for voluntary resignation
NH Law Against Discrimination — applies to employers with 6+ employees; covers age, sex, race, creed, colour, marital status, familial status, disability, national origin, sexual orientation
Whistleblowers' Protection Act — prohibits retaliation for good-faith reports of legal violations to public body or internal authority; 2-year statute of limitations
NH WARN-equivalent — 100+ employees, 60-day advance notice required for qualifying mass layoffs or plant closings

compliance_sources.cite: Cloutier v. A. & P. Tea Co., 121 N.H. 915 (1981)
compliance_sources.fact: New Hampshire Supreme Court recognised public-policy exception to at-will employment
Workers' Compensation Act — filing a claim is a protected activity under the public-policy exception

partner_note: NH EOR runs through Suna Solutions, Inc. (primary US partner) or Precision Global Consulting, Inc. (PGC). No direct Teamed legal entity in the US.
information_gain_angle: RSA 354-A fires at 6 employees (not 15 like federal Title VII/ADA), making New Hampshire's anti-discrimination framework apply to small teams federal law doesn't reach. RSA 275-E protects internal reports as well as external complaints to regulators — most EOR/payroll guides miss this. The 72-hour final pay rule (RSA 275:44) is also stricter than most US states.
audit_flag_detail: RSA 275:44 final pay rule verified against RemoteLaws source; NH DOL source not directly confirmed — provisional
Cloutier v. A. & P. Tea Co. public-policy exception categories: refuse illegal act + exercise statutory right confirmed; full doctrinal scope of subsequent NH Supreme Court extensions provisional
RSA 354-A 6-employee threshold confirmed across multiple sources; precise list of protected classes from NH RSA text — provisional until verified against live RSA
RSA 275-E internal-report protection scope (covers HR/supervisor reports, not just public body) — provisional; relies on statutory text reading
RSA 275-F 100-employee WARN threshold: confirmed consistent with federal WARN Act mirroring; precise qualifying-layoff numbers and timeframe provisional
